sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108006" key="u(perwro/fios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπερωρόφιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n108006.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">over</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">above the roof,</tr_> <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.l. in</abbr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:80" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.80</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
